phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso del mercato, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del mer-KAH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre la mattina, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh la mat-TEE-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il pesce fresco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KWAN-toh KOS-tah eel PEH-sheh FRES-koh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: I prezzi variano, chieda al banco.
likely_response.pronunciation: EE PREHTS-tsee vah-ree-AH-noh kee-EH-dah AHL BAHN-koh
likely_response.translation_en: Prices vary, ask at the counter.

responses.english: Prices vary, ask at the counter.
responses.phonetic: EE PREHTS-tsee vah-ree-AH-noh kee-EH-dah AHL BAHN-koh
responses.local: I prezzi variano, chieda al banco.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove trovo i vendori di tonno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh TROH-voh ee ven-DOH-ree dee TON-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: In the center, stall number three.

responses.english: In the center, stall number three.
